assessment.note: She names a real shift since the reorg while still trying to stabilise the team, which suggests mild disconnection and strain rather than disengaged withdrawal.

new_queue.label: Reorg shift
new_queue.name: Since the reorg, what shift has been most noticeable for you day to day?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific reorg change she just named so the manager understands what actually shifted.

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?
new_queue.description: Separates energy from output; avoids leading with 'is something wrong'.

new_queue.label: Open invitation
new_queue.name: Is there anything on your mind that we haven't made space to talk about?
new_queue.description: Intentionally open; lets them name the thing before the manager assumes.

new_queue.label: Support gap
new_queue.name: What support would make the biggest difference for you right now?
new_queue.description: Gives her an easy way to name help she has not asked for yet.

new_queue.label: Next step focus
new_queue.name: Given what we have covered, where do you want to focus first?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the conversation into a near-term choice without opening new threads.
